style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="LOOP CLOSING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="410" width="286" x="504" y="440" as="geometry"> <mxRectangle height="30" width="90" x="560" y="300" as="alternateBounds" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fEc3pf9s2j-ADI0dIakD-3" parent="fEc3pf9s2j-ADI0dIakD-2" style="text;strokeColor=none;align=left;fillColor=none;html=1;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 10px;">1- index&nbsp;<i>recent_kf</i>&nbsp;into HashBoW (&gt;10s)</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 10px;">2- query to HashBoW -&gt; [kfs]</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 10px;"><i>for kf in kfs:</i></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 10px;">3- covisibility check (reverlo. hacerlo solo si comparten n kpts)</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 10px;">4- match <i>kf</i>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<i>recent_kf</i></font></div><div><font size="1" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 102);">5.0- get island based on covisibility and the 3d lms from MDB</font></div><div><font size="1">5.1- rematch for the 3d points</font></div><div><font size="1">5.2- compute relative pose between <i>kf</i>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<i>recent_kf</i></font></div><div><font size="1">(6- ) reproject landmarks of&nbsp;<i>kf</i>&nbsp;into&nbsp;<i>recent_kf</i>&nbsp;and match with FAST+ORB around a square</font></div><div><font size="1">(7- ) repeat step 6.2 using new matches</font></div><div><div><font size="1" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 102);">8.0- get keyframe poses from MDB</font></div><font size="1">8.1- close loop (PGO, etc)</font></div><div><div><font size="1" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 102);">9- send LC result to MDB</font></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="375" width="180" x="6" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fEc3pf9s2j-ADI0dIakD-5"
